use_cases: Product image zoom on hover for e-commerce product detail pages
Interactive image galleries with zoom-on-hover functionality
Photo preview zoom for media-heavy applications
Image detail inspection in documentation or educational content
Interactive media cards with immersive zoom effects
ai_summary: ZoomImageUI is a hover-activated image zoom component that scales an image based on mouse cursor position. The zoom origin dynamically tracks where the user hovers, creating an immersive magnification effect. Built with Framer Motion for smooth transitions, it supports customizable zoom scale, transition timing, background color, and border radius through props.
